files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,8 @@
-model = "gpt-5.3-codex"
-model_reasoning_effort = "xhigh"
+model = "gpt-5.4"
+model_reasoning_effort = "medium"
 personality = "pragmatic"
 web_search = "live"
+service_tier = "fast"
 
 [features]
 multi_agent = true
@@ -12,3 +13,12 @@ notifications = true
 [[prefix_rules]]
 pattern = ["git"]
 decision = "allow"
+
+[projects."/Users/mavam/code/tenzir/tenzir"]
+trust_level = "trusted"
+
+[projects."/Users/mavam/code/mavam/pi-web-providers"]
+trust_level = "trusted"
+
+[notice.model_migrations]
+"gpt-5.3-codex" = "gpt-5.4"
